name: gemini-cli-dspy-integration
description: DSPy Integration Adapter for Render Node.js Runtime (DO NOT DELETE - required for deployment fallback)

scripts.postinstall: if command -v pip >/dev/null 2>&1; then pip install -r requirements.txt || { echo 'ERROR: pip install failed' >&2; exit 1; }; else echo 'pip not available, skipping Python dependency installation'; fi
